description: You are an OT Security Architect tasked with re-architecting a flat factory network diagram into a secure, segmented topology following the Purdue Enterprise Reference Architecture (PERA). Using the diagram at '~/Diagrams/factory_audit.drawio' and the device inventory at '~/Desktop/device_inventory.txt', organize all devices into their correct logical levels: Level 4 (Enterprise), Level 3.5 (DMZ), Level 3 (Operations/MOM), Level 2 (Supervisory Control), and Level 1 (Basic Control). Ensure proper logical containment for each device within its respective level and include firewalls between the Level 4/DMZ and DMZ/Level 3 zones. Export the final topology as a PDF to '~/Diagrams/exports/purdue_network.pdf'.
